prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-UAGBCKO-SML-BRSS-IR-TT Product Type: HARDWARE Brand (from catalog): ToolTreaux Existing Title: ToolTreaux (2-PACK) Solid Brass Clock Winding Key Grandfather Clocks (Even and Odd) Description: Do you have an old grandfather clock or another antique clock that you can't get to work? You may just need a classic clock winding key to get it up and running again. The ToolTreaux Clock Winding Key features 5 common odd clock winding sizes (3, 5, 7, 9, and 11) that will assist with winding old clocks while preventing internal damage to the clock winding mechanism.

These odd-numbered clock winding keys are made of durable, solid brass that won't damage your antique clock. Brass clock winding keys are designed to act as a master key with 5 common winding numbers, making it a more convenient key than having to buy 5 different keys.

Each clock key comes with the following sizes and diameters so you can ensure you're using the proper key for your old clock: number 3 is 3 mm and 1/8", number 5 is 3.5 mm and 9/64", number 7 is 4mm and 5/32", number 9 is 4.5 mm and 0.174" and number 11 is 5 mm and 13/64".

The clock winding key itself measures just 4.75" x 3.25" x .13" and weighs only 1.6oz, so it will easily fit inside most toolboxes, pockets, or bags for easy storage. It comes with a convenient translucent PVC pouch to keep the key safe from scratches when not in use.

If you have any old or antique clocks that don't work, you may just need a clock winding key to fix them. Whether you're a clock collector or enthusiast, or you're hoping to sell it, try the ToolTreaux Odd Clock Winding Key. Search Terms: howard miller clocks durable solid brass clock winding key master universal application grandfather clock key antique clock fix old clocks key clock winder 5 prongs odd sized clock key antique refurbish fix old fashioned clock grandfather clock parts Features: - GRANDFATHER AND ANTIQUE CLOCKS: Brass clock winding key is designed to fit a variety of sized clocks. Each versatile key comes with 5 common odd-numbered clock winding key sizes: 3, 5, 7, 9, and 11. - ODD-NUMBERED WINDING KEYS: Each clock key comes with the following sizes so you can ensure you're using the correct key for your antique clock: number 3 is 3 mm and 1/8", number 5 is 3.5 mm and 9/64", number 7 is 4mm and 5/32", number 9 is 4.5 mm and 0.174" and number 11 is 5 mm and 13/64". - COMPACT AND LIGHTWEIGHT: The clock winding key measures just 4.75" x 3.25" x .13" and weighs only 1.6oz so you can easily fit it in your pocket, toolbox, or toolbag. It comes with a PVC case to keep the key safe during transit or while not in use. - DURABLE CONSTRUCTION: The ToolTreaux clock repair key is made of sturdy, high-quality solid brass that will help prevent damage to the internal mechanisms of your clock while providing long-lasting life. Use the clock winding keys for multiple clocks if you're a collector or enthusiast. - SPECIFICATIONS: Material: solid brass; Color: bronze; Key sizes included (odd): 3, 5, 7,9, 11; Dimensions: 4.75" x 3.25" x .13"; Weight: 1.6oz (.1lbs) === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ToolTreaux Solid Brass Clock Winding Key Odd Sizes
